moments.title: World Cup Final Day!
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup culminates today with the final between European champions Spain and defending champions Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, USA.

angles.name: The Big One
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Who lifts the trophy tonight: Spain or Argentina? The FIFA World Cup Final is LIVE!

angles.name: Pre-match Build-up
angles.copy: Finals day is here! Build-up to the FIFA World Cup Final is underway. Get your snacks ready for Spain vs. Argentina!

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with the final round determining the Champion Golfer of the Year.

angles.name: Golf Final
angles.copy: Who will conquer Royal Birkdale? The final round of The Open Championship is underway! Tune in for golf's oldest major.

angles.name: Local Link
angles.copy: It's the final day of The Open at Royal Birkdale! The eyes of the golf world are on Southport. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the UK Official Singles Chart Number 1 spot for an impressive 18th non-consecutive week, becoming the longest-running UK Number 1 by a British act.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make history with 'Rein Me In' for an incredible 18th week. What a track!

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: A huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is now the longest-running UK Number 1 by a British act. Seriously impressive!

moments.title: World Cup hits chart Top 5
moments.blurb: Oasis's 'Wonderwall' and Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' surge into the UK Singles Chart Top 5, fuelled by World Cup fever, alongside Shakira & Burna Boy's official anthem 'Dai Dai'.

angles.name: Football Anthems
angles.copy: World Cup fever has sent 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' rocketing into the Top 5! Plus, Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' is a new entry. What a chart!

angles.name: Chart Surprises
angles.copy: An unexpected chart comeback for Oasis and Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds! Football really does make anything possible.

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Brian May of Queen, 79 today! A true rock legend and astrophysicist. Is 'Bohemian Rhapsody' his finest work?

moments.title: Fred again.. is 33
moments.blurb: Award-winning DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday today.

angles.name: Dance Maestro
angles.copy: Big birthday shout out to Fred again.., turning 33 today! What's the track that always gets you moving?

angles.name: UK Producer
angles.copy: From producing Ed Sheeran to headlining festivals, happy 33rd birthday to South London's own Fred again..!

moments.title: Gabrielle turns 56
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Gabrielle, known for hits like 'Dreams' and 'Rise', celebrates her 56th birthday today.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the incredible Gabrielle! Her voice is pure magic. What's your favourite Gabrielle classic?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating British music icon Gabrielle, 56 today! Her hits still sound as good as ever. 'Dreams' or 'Rise'?

moments.title: Big Love Festival finishes
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, South Wales' 'friendliest small festival', concludes today after four days of music, arts, and family activities.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Wrap
angles.copy: That's a wrap for Big Love Festival! Hope everyone had an amazing time in South Wales. What were your highlights?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The Big Love Festival comes to a close today! If you were there, send us your best festival memories!

moments.title: Splendour Festival concludes
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's Splendour Festival, held at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, wraps up today after two days of diverse music across five stages.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival 2026 is officially over! Hope you all had a brilliant time at Wollaton Hall. Who was your favourite act?

angles.name: Summer Festival
angles.copy: Another summer festival draws to a close! Splendour Festival concludes today. What were the standout moments?

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Guitar Master
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Carlos Santana turns 79! Get ready for some smooth guitar licks. What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Musical Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Carlos Santana for tomorrow! A true musical icon. Which era of his music do you love most?

moments.title: Summer Holidays begin (England/Scotland)
moments.blurb: School summer holidays officially begin for many students in England and Scotland this week, starting around July 23rd.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Freedom! For many across England & Scotland, school's officially out for summer this week! What are your holiday plans?

angles.name: Summer Break
angles.copy: No more alarms! Scotland's schools are breaking up for summer this week. Time for some well-deserved rest and fun!

moments.title: Commonwealth Games begin in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow, Scotland, on July 23rd, bringing 11 days of elite sporting action.

angles.name: Games Begin
angles.copy: Glasgow is ready! The Commonwealth Games begin on July 23rd. Get ready for 11 days of incredible sport across the city!

angles.name: Sporting Showcase
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are almost here! Starting July 23rd in Glasgow, who are you cheering on?

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd-26th, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Fun
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is back at Henham Park from Thursday! Celebrating 20 years of music, laughs and discovery. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Summer Festival
angles.copy: Get ready for Latitude! The festival kicks off this Thursday with an amazing lineup of music, comedy and more. Who's going?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman Mick Jagger will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: On July 26th, the legendary Mick Jagger turns 83! Still got the moves. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Ageless Performer
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a rock icon! Mick Jagger's 83rd birthday is this Friday. His energy is unmatched!

moments.title: Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor, this Friday! What's your favourite Queen album he helped create?

angles.name: Queen's Beat
angles.copy: Celebrating the man behind the beat! Roger Taylor of Queen turns 77 on July 26th. A rock powerhouse!

moments.title: Geddy Lee turns 73
moments.blurb: Rush frontman and bassist Geddy Lee will celebrate his 73rd birthday on July 29th.

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: On July 29th, the legendary Geddy Lee of Rush turns 73! An absolute master of bass and vocals. Which Rush track defines him for you?

angles.name: Rush Hour
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Rush's Geddy Lee, turning 73 this Wednesday! A true trailblazer in progressive rock.
